sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61390" key="kwru/kion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κωρύκ-ιον</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κώρυκος</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:172" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.172</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>:</entryFree>
